director.name: 帕洛玛·施奈德曼 Paloma Schneideman

introduction: ‘Would you choose them as your mates?’ asks this dark and dreamlike snapshot of a teenage friendship group.After the end-of-year ball, several teens set out to shake off the dust of high school with quiet kick-ons in a palatial house outside Wellington. The vibes shift with the arrival of Yannick, a dropout who’s determined to amp up the party, whose blustering insistence on more, more, more threatens to spill over into blind rage.源自：https://miff.com.au/program/film/gate-crash
